## CollapsibleSection() function

Collapsible section with header toggle.

**Signature:**

```typescript
export declare function CollapsibleSection({ title, isOpen, onToggle, children, className }: ICollapsibleSectionProps): React.ReactElement;
```

Collapsible section element

## Example


```tsx
const [isOpen, setIsOpen] = useState(true);

<CollapsibleSection
  title="Filters"
  isOpen={isOpen}
  onToggle={() => setIsOpen(!isOpen)}
>
  <FilterContent />
</CollapsibleSection>
```
